query: UPDATE users SET loginMethod = 'oauth' WHERE loginMethod NOT IN ('internal', 'oauth') OR loginMethod IS NULL;
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway03.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user M967bVXfxXUhp7W.root --database JLPd83LStLYaV7mJXtu8eL --execute UPDATE users SET loginMethod = 'oauth' WHERE loginMethod NOT IN ('internal', 'oauth') OR loginMethod IS NULL;
